Contact

Professional Contact

Open for banking, finance, and IT opportunities with clear audit accountability.

Reach out for roles or conversations where sector breadth, documentation discipline, and standards-aware audit work matter. Direct email, phone, LinkedIn, and GitHub links are included below for faster follow-up.

04 // Direct Contact

Professional Introduction

Start the conversation through direct contact.

This site is a static portfolio, so the best approach is a direct message with the role, sector context, and expected scope. Responses are handled with the same structure used in reporting and audit follow-through.

Best for Audit roles and banking, finance, or IT opportunities that value documentation quality and cross-sector exposure.
Helpful context Include your organization, sector, expected timeline, and whether the role focuses on audit, finance, systems, or reporting support.
Preferred channel Email is best for structured summaries, while phone and LinkedIn work well for direct discussion and quick clarification.
Email directly Call directly

Response note

Clear, well-scoped inquiries receive the fastest response. Include the role, sector context, and expected support so the reply can be equally structured.
